The college girl is suffrage enthusiast
for the same reason. She has come to her
conclusion by careful thinking and she is not
afraid to stand by it. She has had the COM
mon interests and the training of organiza-
ton in college, and she sees the need for it
among women in the world. She sees. too,
that in this republican government we have
less republican government and less good
government than has almost any country in
the world. She knows that when men hav
do for her she will have to do for herself.
